Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests

Class InDomGoalTacTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests.AbstractTacticTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests.InDomGoalTacTests
public class InDomGoalTacTests extends AbstractTacticTests
Unit tests for the auto-tactic TotalDomRewritesTac.
